info.title: KBO API
info.description:
Crossroads Bank for Enterprises API for retreiving Belgian company information  
🇳🇱 _Dutch_: Kruispuntbank voor Ondernemingen  
🇬🇧 _English_: Crossroads Bank for Enterprises  
🇫🇷 _French_: Banque-Carrefour des Entreprises  
🇩🇪 _German_: Zentrale Datenbank der Unternehmen

get.description: Retrieve the enterprise details by the enterprise number.

parameters.name: enterpriseNumber
parameters.description: Number of the enterprise

200.description: Successful response | Enterprise is found.

enterpriseNumber.description: The enterprise number as digits only.

enterpriseNumberFormatted.description: The enterprise number as formatted human readable string.

active.description: Whether the registration status of the enterprise is active or inactive. This field will also be `false` if the enterprise is in a pre-registration state.

type.description: The company type, `natural` for natural person or `entity` for legal entity.

nl.description: Dutch description

fr.description: French description

nl.description: Dutch description of the juridical form

en.description: English description of the juridical form

fr.description: French description of the juridical form

de.description: German description of the juridical form

nl.description: Dutch abbreviation of the juridical form

en.description: English abbreviation of the juridical form

fr.description: French abbreviation of the juridical form

de.description: German abbreviation of the juridical form

nl.description: Dutch description of the juridical situation

en.description: English description of the juridical situation

fr.description: French description of the juridical situation

de.description: German description of the juridical situation

404.description: Enterprise not found | The specified Enterprise number could not be found, please make sure the enterprise number is valid and correct.

error.example: The `enterprise` item specified could not be found

get.summary: Retrieve contact information of the enterprise.
get.description: Retrieve contact information of the enterprise (phone numbers, email addresses and websites). Please note that companies aren't required to provide these details, so not all enterprises have contact information available.

parameters.name: enterpriseNumber
parameters.description: Number of the enterprise

200.description: Successful response | All contact information of the enterprise.

value.description: The value of the contact type, could be a phone number, email adress or website, depending on the `typeCode`.

404.description: Enterprise not found | The specified Enterprise number could not be found, please make sure the enterprise number is valid and correct.

error.example: The `enterprise` item specified could not be found

402.description: Larger plan required | The endpoint (or a parameter that is present), is only accessible for a specific plan. Please verify the request which plan is required and upgrade accordingly.

error.example: Your active plan doesn't meet the requirements for this endpoint

get.description: Retrieve all the establishments registered for this enterprise.

parameters.name: enterpriseNumber
parameters.description: Number of the enterprise

parameters.name: active
parameters.description: Choose if you also want to retrieve inactive establishments. The default is only active.

200.description: Successful response | All establishments from the enterprise.

establishmentNumber.description: The establishment number without punctuation marks.

establishmentNumberFormatted.description: The estblishment number seperated by punctuation marks.

active.description: Whether the registration status of the establishment is active or inactive. This field will also be `false` if the establishment is in a pre-registration state.

402.description: Larger plan required for this parameter | The parameter you are using, is only accessible for a larger plan. Please verify the request which plan is required and upgrade your plan or omit the parameter.

error.example: Your active plan doesn't meet the requirements for this endpoint

parameter.description: The parameter that should be omitted from the request

error.example: The `enterprise` item specified could not be found

get.summary: Retrieve short financial information of the enterprise.
get.description:
Retrieve short financial information of the enterprise, the following information is available:

 - Paid-in capital
 - Annual assembly
 - Financial start and end year
Please note:
 - sole-proprietorships do not have published financial years, so this information will not be available
 - not all enterprises are required to publicly share this information, so it will not always be available.

parameters.name: enterpriseNumber
parameters.description: Number of the enterprise

200.description: Successful response | Financial information from the enterprise.

capitalValuta.description:
The valuta of the placed capital, while `EUR` is the most common, this value can be any `ISO-4217` code. It's also common for companies founded before the introduction of the Euro to have historical valuta, in example: `BEF`, `FRF` and `NLG`. Most foreign companies have foreign valuta present.
Please visit wikipedia for an up-to-date ISO-4217 list of: - [Active currency codes](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217#Active_codes) - [Historic currency codes](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217#Historical_currency_codes)

annualAssembly.description: The month of the annual assembly, range is 1 to 12.

annualAssemblyMonth.description: Textual presentation in English of the annual assembly.

fiscalEnd.description: The end date of a regular fiscal year. The year is not present here and will be formatted as `0000`.

fiscalSpecialStart.description: The start date of an exceptional fiscal year.

fiscalSpecialEnd.description: The end date of an exceptional fiscal year.

get.summary: Retrieve NSSO (RSZ, LSS, ONSS) details of the enterprise.
get.description:
Retrieve NSSO details of the enterprise.
Known differently per language:

 - NL: Werkgeversrepertorium
 - FR: Répertoire des employeurs
 - DE: Verzeichnis der Arbeitgeber

 - NL: RSZ-nummer
 - FR: N° ONSS
 - DE: LSS-Nummer
 - EN: NSSO number

parameters.name: enterpriseNumber
parameters.description: Number of the enterprise

200.description: Successful response | NSSO information from the enterprise.

nssoNumber.description: The NSSO-number (or RSZ-number, LSS-number, ONSS-number) of the company

nssoNumberFormatted.description: The formatted NSSO-number with a dash of the company

nssoNumberProvisional.description: A temporary NSSO-number that is used when no final NSSO-number has been issued.

dateStart.description: Start date of the employee period
Start date of the employee importance code

nl.description: Dutch description of the code identifier

fr.description: French description of the code identifier

de.description: German description of the code identifier

en.description: English description of the code identifier

402.description: Larger plan required | The endpoint (or a parameter that is present), is only accessible for a specific plan. Please verify the request which plan is required and upgrade accordingly.

error.example: Your active plan doesn't meet the requirements for this endpoint

404.description: The provided enterprise could not be found, or does not have any NSSO information available.

503.description: Service unavailable, please try again later.

get.summary: Retrieve all official functions of the enterprise.
get.description:
Retrieve all the official funtions registered for this enterprise (board of directors).
Please note:
 - that sole proprietorships do not have any board members, except for the natural person that legally owns the company. This will be the only present function.
 - almost all foreign entities do not have any board members registered.

parameters.name: enterpriseNumber
parameters.description: Number of the enterprise

200.description: Successful response | All functions from the enterprise.

nameFirst.description: First name of the board member

nameLast.description: Last name of the board member

parentEnterpriseNumber.description: The enterprise number of which the role is inherited from. If the `nameLast` and `nameFirst` fields are both empty, the legal entity of the parent enterprise fulfills this role.

dateInOffice.description: The date the person was registered

roleCode.description: Code of the function title. Please be aware that this code may change at anytime, so it's advisable not to put to much reference to this value. Or to check periodicly for any changes.

nl.description: Function title in Dutch

fr.description: Function title in French

nl.description: Possible note regarding function title in Dutch
nl.example: Overeenkomstig het Wetboek van Vennootschappen en Verenigingen moet de term "Zaakvoerder" vanaf 1 januari 2020 gelezen worden als "Bestuurder"

en.description: Possible note regarding the function title in English
en.example: Pursuant to the Code of Companies and Associations, the term "Manager" must, since January 1, 2020, be read as "Board member".

fr.description: Possible note regarding function title in French
fr.example: En application du Code des sociétés et des associations, le terme "Gérant" doit, depuis le 1er janvier 2020, être lu comme étant "Administrateur".

de.description: Possible note regarding function title in German
de.example: Gemäß dem Gesellschafts- und Vereinigungsgesetzbuch ist der Begriff "Geschäftsführer" seit dem 1. Januar 2020 als "Verwalter" zu lesen.

get.description:
Search for denominations (_trade name_) by using keywords.
Both enterprises and establishments can have one or more denominations. Although an enterprise almost always has at lease one denominations, this must not be assumed. So it is adviced to verify any denominations that belong to the enterprise' establishments.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: The keywords to search for the denominations.

parameters.name: entityType
parameters.description: Accepted values: enterprise: show only enterprises, establishment: show only establishments

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter on the type of denomination.

parameters.name: active
parameters.description: Choose if you want search results from inactive enterprises and establishments returned. The default is only active.

parameters.name: language
parameters.description: Search only in this language specified fields

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The page of the results that should be returned

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The limit of results that should be returned, can be a value somewhere between 1 and your plan's maximum. If a higher value is used, this parameter is ignored and your plan's maximum is used instead.

200.description: Successful response | All denominations matching the provided search criteria.

nl.description: Dutch translation of the type description

en.description: English translation of the type description

fr.description: French translation of the type description

de.description: German translation of the type description

limit.description: The used pagination limit, by default the maximum limit allowed by your plan

totalItems.description: The total number of items in the source data

countItems.description: The number of items in the current request

estimate.description: If true, the number of total items is based on a quick scan. The total item count may vary if the next page is requested.

422.description: Invalid response, missing or incorrect parameter

error.example: Missing `query` parameter

402.description: Larger plan required for this parameter | The parameter you are using, is only accessible for a larger plan. Please verify the request which plan is required and upgrade your plan or omit the parameter.

error.example: Your active plan doesn't meet the requirements for this endpoint

parameter.description: The parameter that should be omitted from the request

get.description: Search for multiple addresses by query parameter.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search query

parameters.name: entityType
parameters.description: Filter for a specific entity type

parameters.name: active
parameters.description: Choose if you want search results from inactive enterprises and establishments returned. The default is only active.

parameters.name: fields[]
parameters.description:
Provide the fields that need to be queried.
Possible values:
* `street`: Search in the street field
* `zipcode`: Search in the zipcode field
* `city`: Search in the city field
* `country`: Search in the country field

parameters.name: filter.zipCodeExact
parameters.description: Filter for exact zipcode match

parameters.name: filter.addressNumberExact
parameters.description: Filter for an exact address number match

parameters.name: filter.countryCode
parameters.description: Filter for address country code, this must be an [valid ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_3166-1_alpha-2#Officially_assigned_code_elements)

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The page of the results that should be returned

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The limit of results that should be returned, can be a value somewhere between 1 and your plan's maximum. If a higher value is used, this parameter is ignored and your plan's maximum is used instead.

200.description: Successful response | All addresses matching the provided search criteria.

nl.description: Dutch description

fr.description: French description

nl.description: Dutch street translation of the registration

fr.description: French street translation of the registration

addressNumber.description: Address street number of the registration

postOfficeBox.description: The post office box of the address, if applicable

nl.description: Dutch city translation of the registration

fr.description: French city translation of the registration

countryCode.description: The ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code of the address.

nl.description: Dutch translation of the country

fr.description: French translation of the country

country.description: Translated name of the country code.

limit.description: The used pagination limit, by default the maximum limit allowed by your plan

totalItems.description: The total number of items in the source data

countItems.description: The number of items in the current request

estimate.description: If true, the number of total items is based on a quick scan. The total item count may vary if the next page is requested.

422.description: Invalid response, missing or incorrect parameter

error.example: Missing `query` parameter

402.description: Larger plan required for this parameter | The parameter you are using, is only accessible for a larger plan. Please verify the request which plan is required and upgrade your plan or omit the parameter.

error.example: Your active plan doesn't meet the requirements for this endpoint

parameter.description: The parameter that should be omitted from the request

200.description: Successful response | All function titles returned

roleCode.description: Code of the function title. Please be aware that this code may change at anytime, so it's advisable not to put to much reference to this value. Or to check periodicly for any changes.

get.summary: Verify VAT-number or enterprise number for internation transactions within the EU
get.description: Please note: we use an external service for validating VAT-numbers this may not always be available. Only use this method for validating the VAT-number for international transactions within the EU, not for retrieving company information, you may use the `/enterprise` endpoints for that purpose. Even though the response may say the VAT-number is invalid, it may still be valid for domestic transactions.

parameters.name: vatNumber
parameters.description: The VAT-number to be validated, a valid Belgian VAT-number starts with BE followed by 10 digits. The field may also contains a valid Enterprise number

200.description: Successful response | The VAT-number has been validated. Please note: this does not necessary mean the provided VAT-number is valid, check the `isValid` value of the response.

isValid.description: Boolean if provided VAT-number is valid

address.description: Use the enterprise address endpoint instead.

404.description: Item or resource not found | The item or resource specified could not be found

error.example: The item specified could not be found

500.description: Service for VAT-validation is not available.

Please note that this endpoint is rate limited to once per 60 seconds, if this is exceeded you'll receive a `429` response, and have to wait another 60 seconds before a valid response is returned.

options.summary: Health check for the VAT endpoints
options.description:
Check the health of the VAT endpoints, every `2xx` status code should be considered healthy, and every `5xx` status code should be considered unhealth.
Please note that this endpoint is rate limited to once per 60 seconds, if this is exceeded you'll receive a `429` response, and have to wait another 60 seconds before a valid response is returned.
Endpoints include:
  - /vat/{vatNumber}

204.description: Success response | The VAT endpoints are healthy.

429.description: Too many requests | You have exceeded the rate limit for this endpoint. Consult the `Retry-After` response header after how many seconds you may retry the request again.

error.example: You have exceeded the rate limit for this endpoint, try again in 60 seconds

405.description: Invalid method | Make sure the request is an OPTIONS method

options.summary: Health check for the NSSO endpoints
options.description:
Check the health of the VAT endpoints, every `2xx` status code should be considered healthy, and every `5xx` status code should be considered unhealth.
Please note that this endpoint is rate limited to once per 60 seconds, if this is exceeded you'll receive a `429` response, and have to wait another 60 seconds before a valid response is returned.
Endpoints include:
  - /enterprise/{enterpriseNumber}/nsso

204.description: Success response | The NSSO endpoints are healthy

429.description: Too many requests | You have exceeded the rate limit for this endpoint. Consult the `Retry-After` response header after how many seconds you may retry the request again.

error.example: You have exceeded the rate limit for this endpoint, try again in 60 seconds

405.description: Invalid method | Make sure the request is an OPTIONS method

enterpriseNumber.description: The enterprise number as digits only.

enterpriseNumberFormatted.description: The enterprise number as formatted human readable string.

active.description: Whether the registration status of the enterprise is active or inactive. This field will also be `false` if the enterprise is in a pre-registration state.

type.description: The company type, `natural` for natural person or `entity` for legal entity.

value.description: The value of the contact type, could be a phone number, email adress or website, depending on the `typeCode`.

capitalValuta.description:
The valuta of the placed capital, while `EUR` is the most common, this value can be any `ISO-4217` code. It's also common for companies founded before the introduction of the Euro to have historical valuta, in example: `BEF`, `FRF` and `NLG`. Most foreign companies have foreign valuta present.
Please visit wikipedia for an up-to-date ISO-4217 list of: - [Active currency codes](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217#Active_codes) - [Historic currency codes](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217#Historical_currency_codes)

annualAssembly.description: The month of the annual assembly, range is 1 to 12.

annualAssemblyMonth.description: Textual presentation in English of the annual assembly.

fiscalEnd.description: The end date of a regular fiscal year. The year is not present here and will be formatted as `0000`.

fiscalSpecialStart.description: The start date of an exceptional fiscal year.

fiscalSpecialEnd.description: The end date of an exceptional fiscal year.

nssoNumber.description: The NSSO-number (or RSZ-number, LSS-number, ONSS-number) of the company

nssoNumberFormatted.description: The formatted NSSO-number with a dash of the company

nssoNumberProvisional.description: A temporary NSSO-number that is used when no final NSSO-number has been issued.

dateStart.description: Start date of the employee period

dateInOffice.description: The date the person was registered

roleCode.description: Code of the function title. Please be aware that this code may change at anytime, so it's advisable not to put to much reference to this value. Or to check periodicly for any changes.

denominationType.name: type
denominationType.description: The type of the denomination, see the response parameter for the type explaination.

denominationLanguage.name: language
denominationLanguage.description: The language code of the denomination. Some denominations may not have the language specified, use the `unknown` value in this case.

page.name: page
page.description: The page of the results that should be returned

limit.name: limit
limit.description: The limit of results that should be returned, can be a value somewhere between 1 and your plan's maximum. If a higher value is used, this parameter is ignored and your plan's maximum is used instead.

active.name: active
active.description: Choose if you want search results from inactive enterprises and establishments returned. The default is only active.

items.description: The entity number to subscribe to

X-API-Key-Type.description: The type of the used API-key. `development` for a development-key and `production` regarding a production key.

X-Environment.description: The type of environment request. Can be either `sandbox` or `production`.

X-API-Request-Count.description: The request count usage of the current period, excluding the current request.

X-API-Request-Limit.description: The maximum allowed requests per period.

X-API-Search-Request-Count.description: The maximum allowed search requests per period.

X-API-Search-Request-Limit.description: The request search count usage of the current period, excluding the current request.

large.name: Large plan or up
large.description: Only available for Large or Custom plans

medium.name: Medium plan or up
medium.description: Only available for Medium plan or higher

inactive.name: Large plan or up
inactive.description: View inactive enterprises and establishments, and related information

tags.name: Denominations
tags.description: All denomination (business names, trade names) endpoints

parameters.name: Content-Length
parameters.description: Length of the JSON request body.

parameters.name: Content-Type
parameters.description: The content type of the request body, will always be `application/json`.

parameters.name: Content-Digest
parameters.description: The SHA-256 calculated hash of the request body.

parameters.name: Date
parameters.description: Date of the request.

parameters.name: X-Webhook-Id
parameters.description: The ID of the webhook that triggered the event.

parameters.name: X-Webhook-Event-Id
parameters.description: The ID of the webhook event.

parameters.name: X-Webhook-Created-At
parameters.description: The original creation date of the webhook event, incase of a retry this value will stay the same.

parameters.name: X-Webhook-Signature
parameters.description: The calculated HMAC-SHA256 hash of the request body with the webhook secret. Use this hash to verify if the contents really came from our server. The hash is encoded using Base64.

parameters.name: X-Attempt-Count
parameters.description: Number of attemts to deliver the webhook, first time will be `1`.

parameters.name: X-Attempt-Count-Max
parameters.description: The maximum numbers of retries will be executed for this webhook event.

requestBody.description: Enterprises and establishment that have changes. The meta data will be an empty object `{}` for now, in the future we might use this to provide more details information about what has been changed at the entity.

200.description: Return a 200 status to indicate that the data was received
